features.description: deploy checklist update + clean build + noindex grep on 4 pages
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && rm -rf dist .astro && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1 && for p in /post/login /post/new /ko/post/login /ko/post/new; do grep -q "name=\"robots\" content=\"noindex" "dist${p}/index.html" || exit 1; done'
